name: AllergicConditionCode
title: Allergic Condition Code
description:
This subset contains concepts that represent allergic conditions including allergic disorders, allergic dispositions, and allergic reactions.

This is a broad data exchange subset that is intended to support semantic interoperability and conformance testing. It is recommended that jurisdictions define and implement more specific clinically curated subsets that contain a portion of these concepts for data capture at the point of care for their specific use case.

This subset was defined using the intensional definition of <473011001\|Allergic condition (finding)\| against the substrate SNOMED CT Canadian Edition.

This resource is an informative value set; a [reference subset](https://tgateway.infoway-inforoute.ca/vs/allergicconditioncode) containing the expanded values can be found on Canada Health Infoway's [Terminology Gateway](https://tgateway.infoway-inforoute.ca).

Future releases to PS CA may expand this ValueSet, or add another ValueSet to convey non-allery hypersensitivities.
